title: Login page not loading
description: Customer reports that the login page shows a blank screen after submitting credentials.

title: Payment failed but amount deducted
description: User completed checkout but received a payment failed message while the amount was deducted.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset link expires immediately after clicking.

title: Product image not displaying
description: Images on the product details page are broken for multiple items.

title: Order confirmation email not received
description: Customer did not receive confirmation email after successful purchase.

title: Website loading slowly
description: User experiencing slow loading times on homepage and product pages.

title: Cart items disappearing
description: Items added to cart disappear after refreshing the page.

title: Discount code not applying
description: Promo code shows invalid even though it is active.

title: Profile update not saving
description: Changes made in user profile are not being saved.

title: Search functionality not returning results
description: Search bar returns empty results even for existing products.

title: Error 500 on checkout
description: Internal server error appears when attempting to complete purchase.

title: Mobile menu not working
description: Hamburger menu does not expand on mobile devices.

title: Invoice download issue
description: PDF invoice fails to download after clicking the download button.

title: Account locked after multiple attempts
description: Customer account locked after entering wrong password several times.

title: Notification settings not updating
description: User unable to change email notification preferences.
